source.title: On the Integration of Space, Time, and Memory

confidence_rationale: Strong theoretical synthesis arguing hippocampal coding is multi-dimensional mixed-selectivity at the cell level. Per-stream V_s in the substrate maps cleanly as a projection-readout of the integrated mixed code. Granularity-emerges-from-task framing complicates the substrate's fixed-granularity commitment but does not weaken the per-stream V_s architecture.
failure_signatures: Per-stream V_s as a biology-faithful per-stream computation is incorrect -- biology computes mixed-selectivity integrated code; per-stream V_s in the substrate is a projection-readout of that integrated code (computational convenience that surfaces existing information).

A substrate that fixes granularity at one scale (e.g. place-cell-field only) loses the dimension-emerges-from-task flexibility biology has. Multi-scale or task-adaptive granularity is closer to biology.

mapping.source_claim_statement: Hippocampal CA1 carries multiplexed independent representations of multiple dimensions (space, time, sequence position, abstract relations) with mixed selectivity at the single-cell level. The relevant organisation scale depends on task structure rather than being fixed.
mapping.ree_translation: Per-stream V_s in the substrate is a projection-readout of an underlying integrated mixed-selectivity representation -- a computational convenience surfacing existing information, not a biology-deviating per-stream computation. MECH-269 anchor keys are multi-dimensional; the per-stream vector is the disambiguator over a mixed-code substrate.
mapping.mapping_caveat: Theoretical review, no new data. Granularity-emerges-from-task position implies a fully principled substrate would not fix granularity architecturally -- the substrate plan's commitment to environmentally-grounded chunks is a pragmatic simplification.
mapping.source_context: Theoretical synthesis of place-cell, time-cell, grid-cell, and event-cell literatures.

confidence_components.notes: Very high source quality. Mapping fidelity strong for the per-stream-V_s-as-projection reading; the granularity-emerges-from-task implication is harder to operationalise but does not undermine the architectural choice.
